---
title: "MAFB EMX2 OE Chicken Analysis"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(scCustomize)
library(rtracklayer)
library(cowplot)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(Rsamtools)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(qs)
library(Nebulosa)
library(RRHO2)
library(extrafont)

source("../scripts/scRNA.R")
source(here::here("config/paths.R"))
source("../scripts/gene_lists.R")
source("../scripts/scenicplus.R")

plot_theme <- function() {
  theme(
    text             = element_text(family = "sans"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 5),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 5), 
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 5),
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 5),
    legend.key.size  = unit(3, "pt"),
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 6),
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 5)
  )
}

umap_theme <- function() {
  plot_theme() +
  theme(
    axis.text        = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks       = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_blank(),
    axis.line        = element_blank()
  )
}

set.seed(10)
```

```{r setup-paths}
# Define input/output paths

data_dirs <- map(c("/hdd/brad/pipseq/260312_chicken_mafb_emx2/bGalGal1.mat.mafb_v2",
                   "/hdd/brad/pipseq/260312_chicken_mafb_emx2/bGalGal1.mat.emx2"), function(x) list.files(x, full.names = TRUE)) %>% flatten()

in_files <- map(data_dirs, function(x) {
  files = list.files(x, pattern = "scRNA\\.filtered", full.names = TRUE)
  files
})
samples = map_chr(data_dirs, basename)
names(in_files) <- samples
names(data_dirs) = samples

out_dir <- file.path("/ssd/brad/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/overexpression/", "chick_mafb-emx2_run1")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

obj_fname <- file.path(out_dir, "obj.qs")
```

## Gene Annotation

```{r load-annotation}
load_gene_annotation <- function(gtf_path) {
  annotation <- import(gtf_path)
  annotation$gene_biotype <- if_else(is.na(annotation$gene_biotype), "", annotation$gene_biotype)
  annotation$gene_name <- annotation$gene
  annotation$gene_id <- str_replace(annotation$gene_id, "_", "-")
  
  # Extract mitochondrial genes
  annotation_mt <- annotation[seqnames(annotation) == "chrMT", ]
  genes_mt <- na.omit(annotation_mt$Name)
  
  list(
    annotation = annotation,
    annotation_mt = annotation_mt,
    genes_mt = genes_mt
  )
}

annot_data <- load_gene_annotation(
  GTF_CHICKEN_MAFB_EMX2
)

# Check for transgenes
as.data.frame(annot_data$annotation) %>% 
  filter(grepl("plasmid", Name))
```

## Process snRNA-seq Data

```{r qc-filtering}
apply_qc_filters <- function(obj, mito_features, max_mito = 2, 
                             max_count = 20000, min_count = 1000) {
  obj <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, features = mito_features, col.name = "perc_mito")
  
  # Plot before filtering
  print(VlnPlot_scCustom(obj, c("perc_mito", "nCount_RNA"), pt.size = 0))
  
  # Apply filters
  obj_filt <- subset(
    obj,
    subset = perc_mito < max_mito & 
             nCount_RNA < max_count & 
             nCount_RNA > min_count
  )
  
  # Plot after filtering
  gg <- VlnPlot_scCustom(
    obj_filt, 
    features = c("nCount_RNA", "perc_mito"),
    pt.size = 0
  )
  print(gg)
  
  return(obj_filt)
}
```

```{r process-seurat}
redo <- FALSE

if (redo) {
  # Load and merge data
  mats <- map(in_files, ~ReadMtx(mtx = .x[3], cells = .x[1], features = .x[2]))

  # Pad matrices to the union of all rownames so transgene rows present in one
  # condition (e.g. MAFB-tg, EMX2-tg) are represented as zeros in the other
  all_genes <- Reduce(union, map(mats, rownames))
  mats <- map(mats, function(mat) {
    missing <- setdiff(all_genes, rownames(mat))
    if (length(missing) == 0) return(mat)
    zero_rows <- Matrix::Matrix(0L, nrow = length(missing), ncol = ncol(mat),
                                sparse = TRUE,
                                dimnames = list(missing, colnames(mat)))
    rbind(mat, zero_rows)[all_genes, ]
  })

  objs <- imap(mats, function(mat, sample_name) {
    obj_tmp <- CreateSeuratObject(mat)
    obj_tmp$sample <- sample_name
    obj_tmp
  })
  
  obj <- Merge_Seurat_List(objs, add.cell.ids = names(in_files))
  
  # QC filtering
  mito_features <- intersect(rownames(obj), annot_data$annotation_mt$gene_id)
  obj <- apply_qc_filters(obj, mito_features, max_count = 20000, min_count = 100)
  
  # Process RNA - standard and harmony
  obj <- process_rna(
    obj, 
    cluster_prefix = "cluster", 
    rna_dims_list = 30, 
    run_sct = TRUE, 
    run_parallel = FALSE
  )
  
  obj <- process_rna(
    obj, 
    cluster_prefix = "cluster", 
    rna_dims_list = 30, 
    run_sct = TRUE, 
    run_parallel = FALSE, 
    use_harmony = TRUE
  )
  
  qsave(obj, obj_fname)
} else {
  obj <- qread(obj_fname)
}
```

## Load souporcell

## Visualization

```{r plot-functions}
plot_umap_by_category <- function(obj, categories, reduction, out_dir) {
  walk(categories, function(cat) {
    # Standard plot
    gg <- DimPlot(obj, group.by = cat, reduction = reduction) +
      coord_equal() + umap_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(
      file.path(out_dir, sprintf("umap_by_%s_%s.pdf", reduction, cat)),
      gg, base_height = 5, base_width = 5
    )

    # Split plot
    gg_split <- DimPlot(obj, group.by = cat, split.by = cat, reduction = reduction) +
      coord_equal() + umap_theme()
    print(gg_split)
    save_plot(
      file.path(out_dir, sprintf("umap_split-by_%s_%s.pdf", reduction, cat)),
      gg_split, base_height = 5, base_width = 5
    )
  })
}

plot_clusters <- function(obj, cluster_pattern, reduction, out_dir,
                         exclude_pattern = NULL) {
  cluster_cols <- grep(cluster_pattern, colnames(obj@meta.data), value = TRUE)

  if (!is.null(exclude_pattern)) {
    cluster_cols <- grep(exclude_pattern, cluster_cols, value = TRUE, invert = TRUE)
  }

  walk(cluster_cols, function(res) {
    gg <- DimPlot(obj, group.by = res, label = TRUE, reduction = reduction) +
      labs(title = res) + umap_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir, sprintf("umap_%s.pdf", res)), gg,
              base_height = 5, base_width = 5)
  })
}

plot_features <- function(obj, features, reduction, out_dir) {
  features_present <- intersect(features, rownames(obj))
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  walk(features_present, function(feat) {
    gg <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(obj, features = feat, reduction = reduction) +
      coord_equal() + umap_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir, sprintf("umap_%s.pdf", feat)), gg,
              base_height = 5, base_width = 5)
  })
}

plot_density_features <- function(obj, features, reduction, out_dir) {
  features_present <- intersect(features, rownames(obj))
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  walk(features_present, function(feat) {
    gg <- plot_density(obj, features = feat, reduction = reduction, size = 0.1) +
      coord_equal() + umap_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir, sprintf("umap_density_%s.pdf", feat)), gg,
              base_height = 5, base_width = 5)
  })
}
```

```{r generate-plots}
redo_plot <- TRUE
reduction <- "umap_rna_30_mindist0.3nn30"

if (redo_plot) {
  # Plot by sample
  plot_umap_by_category(obj, c("sample"), reduction, out_dir)
  
  # Plot clusters
  plot_clusters(obj, "cluster", reduction, out_dir, exclude_pattern = "harmony")
  
  # Plot features
  features <- c(
    unlist(ct_markers),
    "FOXP2", "NPY", "PVALB", "PENK", "LHX8",
    "NXPH1", "DACH2", "NR2F2", "LHX9", "NR4A2", "MAFB", "EMX2", "mScarlet", "EMX2-tg", "MAFB-tg", "mNeonGreen"
  )
  plot_features(obj, features, reduction, out_dir)
  plot_density_features(obj, features, reduction, file.path(out_dir, "density"))
}
```

```{r}
# Dot plot

features <- c(
  unlist(ct_markers), 
  "FOXP2", "NPY", "PVALB", "PENK", "LHX8", 
  "NXPH1", "DACH2", "NR2F2", "LHX9", "NR4A2", "MAFB", "EMX2", "mScarlet", "EMX2-tg", "MAFB-tg", "mNeonGreen"
)

gg <- DotPlot_scCustom(
  obj,
  features = intersect(features, rownames(obj)),
  group.by = "cluster_pca_30_0.5",
  flip_axes = TRUE
) + plot_theme()
print(gg)
save_plot(file.path(out_dir, "dotplot_cluster.pdf"), gg,
          base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)
```

```{r}
gg = FeaturePlot_scCustom(obj, c("MAFB-tg"), split.by="sample") + umap_theme()
print(gg)
save_plot(file.path(out_dir, "umap_MAFB-tg_split-sample.pdf"), gg,
          base_height = 5, base_width = 5)
```

```{r}
  # Plot features
  features <- c(
    "RCAN2", "M1AP", "MAFB-tg", "DOLK", "GSDMA", "SLC13A1","FKBP9", "CDHR2", "MGAT4C", "CACNA1C"
  )
  plot_features(obj, features, reduction, out_dir)
  
walk(features, function(feat) {
  gg = FeaturePlot_scCustom(obj, feat, split.by="sample") + umap_theme()
  print(gg)
  save_plot(file.path(out_dir, sprintf("umap_%s_split-sample.pdf", feat)), gg,
            base_height = 5, base_width = 5)
})
```

## Determine number of transgene reads and cells

```{r}
obj <- JoinLayers(obj, assay="RNA")
dat <- GetAssayData(obj, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
num_reads = sum(dat["MAFB-tg",])
num_cells = sum(dat["MAFB-tg",]>=1)
perc_cells = round(num_cells / length(Cells(obj)) * 100, 2)
message(sprintf("# MAFB-tg reads: %s", num_reads))
message(sprintf("# MAFB-tg+ cells: %s (%s %% of total)", num_cells, perc_cells))

mafb_pos_cells = dat["MAFB-tg",]>=1
emx2_pos_cells = dat["EMX2-tg",]>=1
obj$tg_pos = case_when(mafb_pos_cells ~ "MAFB",
                       emx2_pos_cells ~ "EMX2",
                       .default="none")
```

```{r}
res_to_use = "cluster_pca_30_0.5"
idents_comb = c(`0`="Glut-1",
                `1`="PC-1",
                `2`="PC-2",
                `3`="PC-3",
                `4`="GABA",
                `5`="Glut-2",
                `6`="GABA",
                `7`="Epen",
                `8`="GABA",
                `9`="Endo",
                `10`="PC-4",
                `11`="GABA",
                `12`="OPC",
                `13`="Micro"
                )

out_cluster_cur = str_interp("celltype")
out_cluster_cur_sym = as.symbol(out_cluster_cur)
obj@meta.data[,out_cluster_cur] <- plyr::mapvalues(x = obj@meta.data[,res_to_use], from = names(idents_comb), to = idents_comb)
```

```{r}
plot_umap_by_category(obj, c("celltype"), reduction, out_dir)
```

```{r add-variables}
obj$celltype_tg_pos = paste(obj$celltype, obj$tg_pos, sep="_")
celltype_vec = as.character(obj$celltype)
obj$cell_class = case_when(grepl("^PC", celltype_vec) ~ "PC",
                           grepl("Glut", celltype_vec) ~ "Glut",
                           grepl("GABA", celltype_vec) ~ "GABA",
                           .default=celltype_vec)
obj$cell_class_tg_pos = paste(obj$cell_class, obj$tg_pos, sep="_")
obj$cell_class_sample_tg_pos = paste(obj$cell_class, obj$sample, obj$tg_pos, sep="_")
```

## DEG

```{r}

markers_fname = file.path(out_dir, "markers.rds")
markers_pos_fname = file.path(out_dir, "markers_pos.rds")

tg_genes = c("MAFB", "EMX2")

redo = F
if (redo) {
obj = PrepSCTFindMarkers(obj, assay = "SCT", verbose = TRUE)

cell_classes = c("Glut", "GABA", "PC")


markers = map(cell_classes, function(cc_cur) {
  map(tg_genes, function(tg_gene) {
    markers_cur = FindMarkers(obj, 
                              ident.1 = sprintf("%s_%sp_%s", cc_cur, tg_gene, tg_gene), 
                              ident.2 = sprintf("%s_MAFBn_none", cc_cur), 
                              group.by = "cell_class_sample_tg_pos")
    markers_cur$gene = rownames(markers_cur)
    markers_cur
  }) %>% set_names(tg_genes) %>% bind_rows(.id="tg")
}) %>% set_names(cell_classes) %>% bind_rows(.id="cell_class")

markers_pos = map(cell_classes, function(cc_cur) {
  map(tg_genes, function(tg_gene) {
    markers_cur = FindMarkers(obj, 
                              ident.1 = sprintf("%s_%s", cc_cur, tg_gene), 
                              ident.2 = sprintf("%s_none", cc_cur), 
                              group.by = "cell_class_tg_pos")
    markers_cur$gene = rownames(markers_cur)
    markers_cur
  }) %>% set_names(tg_genes) %>% bind_rows(.id="tg")
}) %>% set_names(cell_classes) %>% bind_rows(.id="cell_class")

saveRDS(markers, markers_fname)
saveRDS(markers_pos, markers_pos_fname)
} else {
  markers = readRDS(markers_fname)
  markers_pos = readRDS(markers_pos_fname)
  
}
```


## Load scenicplus results

```{r}

config_dir = "/hdd/jupyter/brad/scenicplus/motor-pathway_multiome/motor-pathway_multiome_seurat_cellbender.0.05_preprocess_cr/glut-ra_glut-arco-1_seurat-snrna-clustering/scenicplus/config14/"
```

<!-- convert_category_to_factor and extract_matrix are defined in scenicplus.R -->

```{r}
ereg_file = file.path(config_dir, "outs", "scplusmdata.h5mu")

cis_types = c("direct", "extended")

## Extract eRegulon metadata
ereg = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
  rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp("/uns/${cis_type}_e_regulon_metadata")) %>%
    do.call(cbind.data.frame, .)
}) %>% bind_rows() %>% mutate(class = "Glut")

2## Gene and region AUC
gene_auc = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
  extract_matrix(str_interp("/mod/${cis_type}_gene_based_AUC"), ereg_file)
}) %>% bind_cols() %>% rownames_to_column("_index")

region_auc = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
  extract_matrix(str_interp("/mod/${cis_type}_region_based_AUC"), ereg_file)
}) %>% bind_cols() %>% rownames_to_column("_index")

## Group labels
group_set = rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp("/mod/scRNA_counts/obs"))
group_set = group_set[c("_index", "cluster")]
factor_ind = which(map_lgl(group_set, ~length(.x)==2))
for (fi in factor_ind) {
  group_set[[fi]] = convert_category_to_factor(group_set[[fi]])
}
group_df = cbind.data.frame(group_set)

labels_order = levels(group_df$cluster)
labels_order = c(sort(grep("HVC", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("NC", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Nido", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("RA", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Arco", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Glut-Pre", labels_order, value=T), decreasing = T),
                 sort(grep("GABA", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("GABA-Pre", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Astro", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Epen", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Oligo", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("OPC", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Micro", labels_order, value=T)),
                 sort(grep("Endo", labels_order, value=T)))
labels_order = unique(labels_order)

group_df = group_df %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels=labels_order))

gene_auc = gene_auc %>% left_join(group_df)
region_auc = region_auc %>% left_join(group_df)

gene_auc = gene_auc %>% filter(!is.na(cluster))
region_auc = region_auc %>% filter(!is.na(cluster))

## Compute derived columns
ereg = ereg %>%
  mutate(importance_x_abs_rho_TF2G = importance_TF2G * abs(rho_TF2G),
         importance_x_rho_TF2G = importance_TF2G * rho_TF2G) %>%
  mutate(importance_x_rho_log_TF2G = log(importance_x_rho_TF2G),
         importance_x_abs_rho_log_TF2G = log(importance_x_abs_rho_TF2G),
         importance_log_TF2G = log(importance_TF2G))

ereg_sizes = ereg %>%
  mutate(size_genes = as.integer(str_extract(Gene_signature_name, "\\(([0-9]+)g\\)", group=T))) %>%
  distinct(size_genes, TF, eRegulon_name)
```

```{r}
ereg_un = ereg %>% distinct(Gene, importance_TF2G, importance_x_rho_TF2G, rho_TF2G, TF, eRegulon_name)

eregulon_n = 5
mafb_pattern <- "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+"

top_ereg_tfs <- ereg_sizes %>%
  filter(grepl("\\+/\\+", eRegulon_name), !TF %in% c("MAFB", "EMX2")) %>%
  group_by(TF) %>%
  summarise(size_genes = max(size_genes, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(size_genes)) %>%
  slice_head(n = eregulon_n) %>%
  pull(TF)

to_select_list <- c(mafb_pattern, "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                    map_chr(top_ereg_tfs, ~sprintf("%s_.*_\\+\\/\\+", str_escape(.x))))

walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  out_dir_tg = file.path(out_dir, tg_cur)
  dir.create(out_dir_tg, showWarnings = FALSE)
  markers_tg = markers %>% filter(tg == tg_cur)

  walk(to_select_list, function(to_select) {
    ereg_un_sel = ereg_un %>% dplyr::filter(grepl(to_select, eRegulon_name)) %>%
      dplyr::rename(gene = Gene)
    ereg_un_sel = ereg_un_sel %>% left_join(markers_tg) %>%
      filter(!is.na(p_val))
    fname_stem = gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_-]", "", to_select)

    gg = ggplot(ereg_un_sel, aes(rho_TF2G, avg_log2FC)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
      labs(title=to_select) + theme_bw() + plot_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, sprintf("ereg_rho_%s.pdf", fname_stem)), gg,
              base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)

    gg = ggplot(ereg_un_sel, aes(importance_TF2G, avg_log2FC)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
      labs(title=to_select) + theme_bw() + plot_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, sprintf("ereg_importance_%s.pdf", fname_stem)), gg,
              base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)
  })

  ereg_un_sel_base = ereg_un %>% dplyr::filter(grepl(paste(to_select_list, collapse="|"), eRegulon_name)) %>%
    dplyr::rename(gene = Gene)

  marker_sets = list(markers = markers_tg, markers_pos = markers_pos %>% filter(tg == tg_cur))
  ks_df = imap_dfr(marker_sets, function(mset, mset_name) {
    ereg_un_sel = ereg_un_sel_base %>% left_join(mset) %>%
      filter(!is.na(p_val))

    baseline_df = ereg_un_sel %>%
      filter(!TF %in% tg_genes) %>%
      group_by(gene) %>%
      summarise(avg_log2FC = mean(avg_log2FC, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    focal_df = ereg_un_sel %>% filter(TF == tg_cur) %>% distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

    focal_fc = focal_df$avg_log2FC
    other_fc = baseline_df$avg_log2FC
    ks_res = ks.test(focal_fc, other_fc)

    gg = ggplot() +
      geom_density(data = baseline_df, aes(avg_log2FC),
                   fill = "gray70", color = "gray70", alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_density(data = focal_df, aes(avg_log2FC, color = TF)) +
      annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 2,
               label = sprintf("KS D=%.3f, p=%.3g", ks_res$statistic, ks_res$p.value)) +
      theme_bw() + plot_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, sprintf("ereg_density_avg_log2FC_%s.pdf", mset_name)), gg,
              base_height = 1.5, base_width = 3)

    gg = ggplot(ereg_un_sel, aes(TF, avg_log2FC)) +
      geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() + plot_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, sprintf("ereg_boxplot_TF_avg_log2FC_%s.pdf", mset_name)), gg,
              base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)

    tibble(tg = tg_cur, marker_set = mset_name,
           ks_D = ks_res$statistic, ks_p = ks_res$p.value,
           n_focal = length(focal_fc), n_other = length(other_fc))
  })
  write_csv(ks_df, file.path(out_dir_tg, "ereg_ks_test_avg_log2FC.csv"))
  print(ks_df)
})
```

## Load DEG

```{r}
markers_sns = readRDS("/hdd/brad/rstudio/snRNA/snrna_cellranger/snrna_seurat_cellbender.0.01_preprocess/deg/song-surround_deg_glut_v2/marker_genes_cluster_SCT.rds")

markers_sns = markers_sns %>%
  dplyr::rename(p_val_sns = p_val,
         avg_log2FC_sns = avg_log2FC,
         pct.1_sns = pct.1,
         pct.2_sns = pct.2,
         p_val_adj_sns = p_val_adj)
markers_sns_base = markers_sns  # save before join, used for RRHO
markers_sns = markers_sns %>%
  left_join(markers)
```

## RRHO Analysis

```{r rrho-helpers}
# Returns a two-column data.frame (gene, value) sorted descending, ready for RRHO2
make_rrho_list <- function(df, rank_var) {
  if (rank_var == "avg_log2FC") {
    df %>%
      transmute(gene, value = avg_log2FC)
  } else {
    df %>%
      mutate(value = -log10(p_val_adj + 1e-300) * sign(avg_log2FC)) %>%
      dplyr::select(gene, value)
  }
}

make_rrho_list_sns <- function(df, rank_var) {
  if (rank_var == "avg_log2FC") {
    df %>%
      transmute(gene, value = avg_log2FC_sns)
  } else {
    df %>%
      mutate(value = -log10(p_val_adj_sns + 1e-300) * sign(avg_log2FC_sns)) %>%
      dplyr::select(gene, value)
  }
}
```

```{r rrho-run}
oe_marker_sets  <- list(markers = markers, markers_pos = markers_pos)
sns_comparisons <- unique(markers_sns_base$compare)
rank_vars       <- c("avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj")

rrho_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "rrho")
dir.create(rrho_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

rrho_summary <- imap_dfr(oe_marker_sets, function(oe_df, oe_name) {
  map_dfr(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
    rrho_dir_tg <- file.path(rrho_dir, tg_cur)
    dir.create(rrho_dir_tg, showWarnings = FALSE)

    map_dfr(cell_classes, function(cc_cur) {
      map_dfr(sns_comparisons, function(cmp_cur) {
        map_dfr(rank_vars, function(rv) {

          oe_cur  <- oe_df %>% filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == cc_cur) %>%
            filter(!duplicated(gene), !is.na(avg_log2FC), !is.na(p_val_adj))
          sns_cur <- markers_sns_base %>% filter(compare == cmp_cur) %>%
            filter(!duplicated(gene), !is.na(avg_log2FC_sns), !is.na(p_val_adj_sns))

          common_genes <- intersect(oe_cur$gene, sns_cur$gene)
          if (length(common_genes) < 10)
            return(tibble(tg = tg_cur, oe_set = oe_name, cell_class = cc_cur,
                          compare = cmp_cur, rank_var = rv,
                          n_common = length(common_genes), max_log_pval = NA_real_))

          l1 <- make_rrho_list(oe_cur %>% filter(gene %in% common_genes), rv) %>%
            arrange(desc(value)) %>% as.data.frame()
          l2 <- make_rrho_list_sns(sns_cur %>% filter(gene %in% common_genes), rv) %>%
            arrange(desc(value)) %>% as.data.frame()

          rrho_obj <- RRHO2_initialize(l1, l2,
            labels = c(sprintf("%s_%s_%s", oe_name, tg_cur, cc_cur),
                       sprintf("sns_%s", cmp_cur)), method = "hyper", log10.ind = TRUE)

          fname_stem <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_-]", "_",
            sprintf("rrho_%s_%s_%s_%s_%s", oe_name, tg_cur, cc_cur, cmp_cur, rv))
          pdf(file.path(rrho_dir_tg, sprintf("%s.pdf", fname_stem)),
              width = 7, height = 7)
          RRHO2_heatmap(rrho_obj)
          dev.off()

          nr      <- nrow(rrho_obj$hypermat)
          nc      <- ncol(rrho_obj$hypermat)
          split_r <- round(nr * mean(l1[, 2] > 0))
          split_c <- round(nc * mean(l2[, 2] > 0))
          quad_idx <- list(
            uu = list(r = seq_len(split_r),            c = seq_len(split_c)),
            ud = list(r = seq_len(split_r),            c = (split_c+1):nc),
            du = list(r = (split_r+1):nr,              c = seq_len(split_c)),
            dd = list(r = (split_r+1):nr,              c = (split_c+1):nc)
          )
          for (quad in names(quad_idx)) {
            idx      <- quad_idx[[quad]]
            masked   <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = nr, ncol = nc)
            masked[idx$r, idx$c] <- rrho_obj$hypermat[idx$r, idx$c]
            vals <- masked[!is.na(masked)]
            if (length(vals) == 0 || diff(range(vals)) == 0) next
            rrho_quad           <- rrho_obj
            rrho_quad$hypermat  <- masked
            pdf(file.path(rrho_dir_tg, sprintf("%s_%s.pdf", fname_stem, quad)),
                width = 7, height = 7)
            tryCatch(RRHO2_heatmap(rrho_quad), error = function(e) NULL)
            dev.off()
          }

          for (quad in c("uu", "dd", "ud", "du")) {
            gl <- rrho_obj[[paste0("genelist_", quad)]]
            if (length(gl) > 0)
              write_lines(gl, file.path(rrho_dir_tg,
                sprintf("%s_%s_genes.txt", fname_stem, quad)))
          }

          max_lp <- max(abs(as.numeric(rrho_obj$hypermat)), na.rm = TRUE)

          tibble(tg = tg_cur, oe_set = oe_name, cell_class = cc_cur,
                 compare = cmp_cur, rank_var = rv,
                 n_common = length(common_genes), max_log_pval = max_lp)
        })
      })
    })
  })
})

walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  rrho_summary_tg <- rrho_summary %>% filter(tg == tg_cur)
  write_csv(rrho_summary_tg, file.path(rrho_dir, tg_cur, sprintf("rrho_summary_%s.csv", tg_cur)))
  print(rrho_summary_tg)
})
```

```{r}

to_select_list = c("MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+", "ZBTB18_.*_\\+\\/\\+", "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+", "SOX5_extended_\\+\\/\\+", "POU3F4_extended_\\+\\/\\+", 	"NFIA_direct_+/+", 
                   "MEIS1_.*_\\+\\/\\+", "AR_direct_\\+\\/\\+")

ereg_un_sel = ereg_un %>% dplyr::filter(grepl(paste(to_select_list, collapse="|"), eRegulon_name)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(gene = Gene)

markers_sns_ereg = markers_sns %>% left_join(ereg_un_sel) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_val))
```

```{r}
walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  out_dir_tg = file.path(out_dir, tg_cur)
  dir.create(out_dir_tg, showWarnings = FALSE)
  markers_sns_ereg_tg = markers_sns_ereg %>% filter(tg == tg_cur)
  tfs = na.omit(unique(markers_sns_ereg_tg$TF))

  walk(tfs, function(tf_cur) {
    markers_sns_cur = markers_sns_ereg_tg %>%
      filter(TF == tf_cur, cell_class == "Glut")
    if (nrow(markers_sns_cur) <= 1) return()

    gg = ggplot(markers_sns_cur, aes(avg_log2FC_sns, avg_log2FC)) +
      geom_point() +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype=2) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype=2) +
      facet_wrap(~compare) +
      labs(title = tf_cur) + plot_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, sprintf("deg_ereg_%s.pdf", tf_cur)), gg,
              base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)
  })
})
```

```{r}
markers_sns_ereg = markers_sns_ereg %>%
  mutate(avg_log2FC_tg_sns = avg_log2FC * avg_log2FC_sns)
```

## Load mutliome-seq object

```{r}
multi_fname = "~/ssd/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/seurat/motor-pathway_multiome_seurat_cellbender.0.05_preprocess_cr/reduction_viz/combined_all_umap_cluster-snrna-cr/obj_clustered.qs"
multi_obj = qread(multi_fname)
```

### Plot DEG expression in songbird

```{r plot-deg-songbird-multi}
multi_reduction = "dims30nn30mindist0.3"
n_top = 10

walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  out_dir_tg = file.path(out_dir, tg_cur)
  dir.create(out_dir_tg, showWarnings = FALSE)

  top_markers = markers %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(multi_obj)) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()

  top_markers_pos = markers_pos %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(multi_obj)) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()

  plot_features(multi_obj, top_markers, multi_reduction,
                file.path(out_dir_tg, "multi_top_markers"))
  plot_density_features(multi_obj, top_markers, multi_reduction,
                        file.path(out_dir_tg, "multi_top_markers", "density"))

  plot_features(multi_obj, top_markers_pos, multi_reduction,
                file.path(out_dir_tg, "multi_top_markers_pos"))
  plot_density_features(multi_obj, top_markers_pos, multi_reduction,
                        file.path(out_dir_tg, "multi_top_markers_pos", "density"))

  multi_glut = subset(multi_obj, cells = Cells(multi_obj)[grepl("Glut", multi_obj$cluster)])

  for (gene_set in list(list(genes = top_markers,     stem = "multi_top_markers"),
                        list(genes = top_markers_pos, stem = "multi_top_markers_pos"))) {
    feats = intersect(gene_set$genes, Features(multi_glut))
    if (length(feats) == 0) next
    avg_mat    = AverageExpression(multi_glut, features = feats, group.by = "cluster", assay = "SCT")$SCT
    avg_scaled = t(scale(t(avg_mat)))
    avg_scaled = avg_scaled[complete.cases(avg_scaled), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(avg_scaled) == 0) next
    ht = Heatmap(avg_scaled, name = "z-score",
                 cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_columns = FALSE,
                 row_names_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                 heatmap_legend_param = list(labels_gp     = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                            title_gp      = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                            direction     = "horizontal",
                                            legend_width  = unit(20, "mm"),
                                            grid_height   = unit(2.5, "mm")))
    pdf(file.path(out_dir_tg, gene_set$stem, "heatmap_glut.pdf"),
        width = ncol(avg_scaled) * 0.25 + 1.5, height = nrow(avg_scaled) * 0.2 + 1)
    draw(ht)
    dev.off()
  }
})
```

## Load snRNA-seq object

```{r}
sn_fname = "~/hdd/rstudio/snRNA/snrna_cellranger/snrna_seurat_cellbender.0.01_preprocess/reduction_viz/combined_all_umap/obj_clustered.qs"
sn_obj = qread(sn_fname)
sn_glut = subset(sn_obj, cells = Cells(sn_obj)[grepl("Glut", sn_obj$cluster)])
```

### Plot DEG expression in songbird

```{r plot-deg-songbird-sn}
sn_reduction = "dims40nn30mindist0.3"
n_top = 20
 


walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  out_dir_tg = file.path(out_dir, tg_cur)
  dir.create(out_dir_tg, showWarnings = FALSE)

  top_markers = markers %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()

  top_markers_pos = markers_pos %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()

  plot_features(sn_obj, top_markers, sn_reduction,
                file.path(out_dir_tg, "sn_top_markers"))
  plot_density_features(sn_obj, top_markers, sn_reduction,
                        file.path(out_dir_tg, "sn_top_markers", "density"))

  plot_features(sn_obj, top_markers_pos, sn_reduction,
                file.path(out_dir_tg, "sn_top_markers_pos"))
  plot_density_features(sn_obj, top_markers_pos, sn_reduction,
                        file.path(out_dir_tg, "sn_top_markers_pos", "density"))
})
```

#### Heatmaps

```{r plot-deg-songbird-sn-heatmap}
# Song neuron → paired non-song neuron
song_pairs = list(
  "Glut-RA"    = "Glut-Arco-1",
  "Glut-HVC-1" = "Glut-NC-1",
  "Glut-HVC-2" = "Glut-NC-4"
)

all_cts      = c(names(song_pairs), unname(unlist(song_pairs)))
adjust_factor = 0.08

n_top = 20

walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  out_dir_tg = file.path(out_dir, tg_cur)

  top_markers = markers %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
    #filter(p_val_adj < 0.1) %>% 
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()
  
  top_markers_pos = markers_pos %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
    #filter(p_val_adj < 0.1) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()
  
  gene_sets = list(
    list(genes = top_markers,     stem = "sn_top_markers",     oe_src = markers),
    list(genes = top_markers_pos, stem = "sn_top_markers_pos", oe_src = markers_pos)
  )
  for (gene_set in gene_sets) {
    feats = intersect(gene_set$genes, Features(sn_glut))
    if (length(feats) == 0) next
    avg_mat = log2(AggregateExpression(sn_obj, features = feats, group.by = "cluster", assay = "SCT")$SCT+1)
    avg_mat = avg_mat[, all_cts]

    # Normalize each song neuron against its non-song pair (log-scale difference)
    norm_mat = do.call(cbind, map(names(song_pairs), function(song_ct) {
      avg_mat[, song_ct] - avg_mat[, song_pairs[[song_ct]]]
    }))
    colnames(norm_mat) = names(song_pairs)
    norm_scaled = norm_mat
    norm_scaled = norm_scaled[complete.cases(norm_scaled), , drop = FALSE]

    val_limit = ceiling(quantile(abs(norm_scaled), 0.95, na.rm = TRUE))
    norm_scaled = pmin(pmax(norm_scaled, -val_limit), val_limit)
    message(sprintf("[%s / %s] val_limit = %g  (data range: %g – %g)",
                    tg_cur, gene_set$stem, val_limit,
                    min(norm_scaled, na.rm = TRUE), max(norm_scaled, na.rm = TRUE)))
    col = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks = c(-1 * val_limit, 0, val_limit),
                               colors = c("darkblue", "white", "darkred"))
    if (nrow(norm_scaled) == 0) next

    # OE FC column (MAFB+/MAFB- or EMX2+/EMX2-), matched to gene_set source
    g = rownames(norm_scaled)
    oe_fc = setNames(
      (gene_set$oe_src %>% filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut"))$avg_log2FC,
      (gene_set$oe_src %>% filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut"))$gene
    )
    oe_mat = matrix(oe_fc[g], ncol = 1, dimnames = list(g, sprintf("%s+/-", tg_cur)))
    
    oe_lim = ceiling(quantile(abs(oe_mat), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
    oe_lim = ceiling(max(abs(oe_mat)))
    print(oe_lim)
    oe_pal = scales::brewer_pal(type="div", palette=4, direction = -1)
    
    oe_col = circlize::colorRamp2(seq(-1* oe_lim, oe_lim, length.out=9),
                                  oe_pal(9))
    
    ht_oe = Heatmap(oe_mat
                   )
    
    ht_oe
    ht_song = Heatmap(norm_scaled, name = "log2\n(song - non-song)",
                      col = col,
                      cluster_rows    = TRUE,
                      show_row_dend   = FALSE,
                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                      border          = "black",
                      row_names_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                      height = unit(nrow(norm_scaled) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                      width  = unit(ncol(norm_scaled) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                      heatmap_legend_param = list(
                        at         = c(-val_limit, 0, val_limit),
                        labels     = c(sprintf("%.1f", -val_limit), "0",
                                       sprintf("%.1f",  val_limit)),
                        labels_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                        title_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                        direction  = "horizontal",
                        legend_width = unit(15, "mm"),
                        grid_height  = unit(2, "mm")))

    ht_oe = Heatmap(oe_mat, name = sprintf("log2FC\n(%s OE)", tg_cur),
                    col = oe_col,
                    na_col = "gray90",
                    cluster_rows    = FALSE,
                    cluster_columns = FALSE,
                    border          = "black",
                    row_names_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                    height = unit(nrow(oe_mat) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                    width  = unit(ncol(oe_mat) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                    heatmap_legend_param = list(
                      at         = c(-oe_lim, 0, oe_lim),
                      labels     = c(sprintf("%.1f", -oe_lim), "0",
                                     sprintf("%.1f",  oe_lim)),
                      labels_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                      title_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                      direction  = "horizontal",
                      legend_width = unit(15, "mm"),
                      grid_height  = unit(2, "mm")))

    ht = ht_song + ht_oe

    print(ht)
    pdf(file.path(out_dir_tg, gene_set$stem, "heatmap_glut_normed.pdf"),
        width  = (ncol(norm_scaled) + ncol(oe_mat)) * 0.25 + 1.5,
        height = nrow(norm_scaled) * 0.2 + 1)
    draw(ht)
    dev.off()
  }
})
```

#### Heatmaps — combined MAFB + EMX2 top genes

```{r plot-deg-songbird-sn-heatmap-combined}
# Select top DE genes for both transgenes and plot song neuron DE alongside
# both transgene DE columns in a single heatmap per gene set.

gene_sets_combined = list(
  list(stem = "sn_top_markers",     oe_src = markers),
  list(stem = "sn_top_markers_pos", oe_src = markers_pos)
)

out_dir_combined = file.path(out_dir, "combined")
dir.create(out_dir_combined, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (gene_set in gene_sets_combined) {
  # Union of top genes across both transgenes
  all_top = map(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
    gene_set$oe_src %>%
      filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
      filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
      slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
      pull(gene) %>% unique()
  }) %>% unlist() %>% unique()

  feats = intersect(all_top, Features(sn_glut))
  if (length(feats) == 0) next

  avg_mat = log2(AggregateExpression(sn_obj, features = feats, group.by = "cluster", assay = "SCT")$SCT + 1)
  avg_mat = avg_mat[, all_cts]

  # Normalize each song neuron against its paired non-song neuron (log-scale difference)
  norm_mat = do.call(cbind, map(names(song_pairs), function(song_ct) {
    avg_mat[, song_ct] - avg_mat[, song_pairs[[song_ct]]]
  }))
  colnames(norm_mat) = names(song_pairs)
  norm_mat = norm_mat[complete.cases(norm_mat), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(norm_mat) == 0) next

  val_limit = ceiling(quantile(abs(norm_mat), 0.95, na.rm = TRUE))
  norm_scaled = pmin(pmax(norm_mat, -val_limit), val_limit)
  col = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks = c(-1 * val_limit, 0, val_limit),
                             colors = c("darkblue", "white", "darkred"))

  g = rownames(norm_scaled)

  # OE matrix: one column per transgene
  oe_mat = do.call(cbind, map(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
    oe_df = gene_set$oe_src %>% filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut")
    oe_fc = setNames(oe_df$avg_log2FC, oe_df$gene)
    matrix(oe_fc[g], ncol = 1, dimnames = list(g, sprintf("%s+/-", tg_cur)))
  }))

  oe_lim = ceiling(max(abs(oe_mat), na.rm = TRUE))
  oe_pal = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = 4, direction = -1)
  oe_col = circlize::colorRamp2(seq(-oe_lim, oe_lim, length.out = 9), oe_pal(9))

  ht_song = Heatmap(norm_scaled, name = "log2\n(song - non-song)",
                    col = col,
                    cluster_rows    = TRUE,
                    show_row_dend   = FALSE,
                    cluster_columns = FALSE,
                    border          = "black",
                    row_names_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                    height = unit(nrow(norm_scaled) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                    width  = unit(ncol(norm_scaled) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                    heatmap_legend_param = list(
                      at           = c(-val_limit, 0, val_limit),
                      labels       = c(sprintf("%.1f", -val_limit), "0",
                                       sprintf("%.1f",  val_limit)),
                      labels_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                      title_gp     = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                      direction    = "horizontal",
                      legend_width = unit(15, "mm"),
                      grid_height  = unit(2, "mm")))

  ht_oe = Heatmap(oe_mat, name = "log2FC\n(OE)",
                  col = oe_col,
                  na_col = "gray90",
                  cluster_rows    = FALSE,
                  cluster_columns = FALSE,
                  border          = "black",
                  row_names_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontfamily = "sans"),
                  height = unit(nrow(oe_mat) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                  width  = unit(ncol(oe_mat) * adjust_factor, "in"),
                  heatmap_legend_param = list(
                    at           = c(-oe_lim, 0, oe_lim),
                    labels       = c(sprintf("%.1f", -oe_lim), "0",
                                     sprintf("%.1f",  oe_lim)),
                    labels_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                    title_gp     = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                    direction    = "horizontal",
                    legend_width = unit(15, "mm"),
                    grid_height  = unit(2, "mm")))

  ht = ht_song + ht_oe
  print(ht)
  pdf(file.path(out_dir_combined, sprintf("heatmap_glut_normed_%s.pdf", gene_set$stem)),
      width  = (ncol(norm_scaled) + ncol(oe_mat)) * 0.25 + 1.5,
      height = nrow(norm_scaled) * 0.2 + 1)
  draw(ht)
  dev.off()
}
```

#### Scatters

```{r plot-deg-songbird-sn-scatter}
# Background MA ribbons from all genes (computed once)
avg_mat_all = log2(AggregateExpression(sn_glut, group.by = "cluster", assay = "SCT")$SCT + 1)

make_bg_ma <- function(A, M) {
  tibble(A = A, M = M) %>%
    filter(!is.na(A), !is.na(M)) %>%
    mutate(bin = cut(A, breaks = 50)) %>%
    group_by(bin) %>%
    summarise(A_mid = mean(A), M_lo = quantile(M, 0.05), M_hi = quantile(M, 0.95),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(!is.na(bin))
}

bg_ma_sns = markers_sns_base %>%
  filter(compare == "Glut-RA") %>%
  transmute(gene,
            A = (avg_mat_all[gene, "Glut-RA"] + avg_mat_all[gene, "Glut-Arco-1"]) / 2,
            M = avg_log2FC_sns) %>%
  { make_bg_ma(.$A, .$M) }

bg_ma_avgmat = make_bg_ma(
  A = (avg_mat_all[, "Glut-RA"] + avg_mat_all[, "Glut-Arco-1"]) / 2,
  M =  avg_mat_all[, "Glut-RA"] - avg_mat_all[, "Glut-Arco-1"]
)

walk(tg_genes, function(tg_cur) {
  out_dir_tg = file.path(out_dir, tg_cur)

  top_markers = markers %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()

  top_markers_pos = markers_pos %>%
    filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut") %>%
    filter(gene %in% Features(sn_obj)) %>%
    slice_min(p_val_adj, n = n_top) %>%
    pull(gene) %>% unique()

  gene_sets = list(list(genes = top_markers,     stem = "sn_top_markers"),
                   list(genes = top_markers_pos, stem = "sn_top_markers_pos"))
  for (gene_set in gene_sets) {
    feats = intersect(gene_set$genes, Features(sn_glut))
    if (length(feats) == 0) next
    avg_mat = log2(AggregateExpression(sn_obj, features = feats, group.by = "cluster", assay = "SCT")$SCT + 1)

    scatter_base = tibble(
      gene          = rownames(avg_mat),
      `Glut-RA`     = avg_mat[, "Glut-RA"],
      `Glut-Arco-1` = avg_mat[, "Glut-Arco-1"]
    ) %>% mutate(A = (`Glut-RA` + `Glut-Arco-1`) / 2)

    # Scatter (expression axes — same regardless of FC source)
    jitter = position_jitter(width = 0.02, height = 0.02, seed = 42)
    gg = ggplot(scatter_base, aes(`Glut-Arco-1`, `Glut-RA`, label = gene)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.8, position = jitter) +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 1.5, position = jitter,
                               min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf) +
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "gray50") +
      labs(x = "Glut-Arco-1 (log2)", y = "Glut-RA (log2)",
           title = sprintf("%s – %s", tg_cur, gene_set$stem)) +
      theme_bw() + plot_theme()
    print(gg)
    save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, gene_set$stem, "scatter_RA_vs_Arco1.pdf"), gg,
              base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)

    # Two FC versions: avg_log2FC_sns and avg_mat-derived
    sns_ra = markers_sns_base %>%
      filter(compare == "Glut-RA") %>%
      dplyr::select(gene, avg_log2FC_sns)

    fc_versions = list(
      sns    = list(df = scatter_base %>% inner_join(sns_ra, by = "gene") %>%
                           dplyr::rename(M = avg_log2FC_sns),
                    bg     = bg_ma_sns,
                    y_lab  = "avg_log2FC sns (Glut-RA vs Glut-Arco-1)"),
      avgmat = list(df = scatter_base %>% mutate(M = `Glut-RA` - `Glut-Arco-1`),
                    bg     = bg_ma_avgmat,
                    y_lab  = "log2 expr FC (Glut-RA vs Glut-Arco-1)")
    )

    iwalk(fc_versions, function(fv, fv_name) {
      scatter_df = fv$df
      if (nrow(scatter_df) == 0) return()

      ma_jitter = position_jitter(width = 0.02, height = 0.02, seed = 42)
      ma_layers = list(
        geom_point(size = 0.8, position = ma_jitter),
        ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 1.5, position = ma_jitter,
                                 min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf),
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "gray50"),
        labs(x = "Average expression (log2)", y = fv$y_lab,
             title = sprintf("%s – %s", tg_cur, gene_set$stem)),
        theme_bw(), plot_theme()
      )

      ma_base_gg = ggplot(scatter_df, aes(A, M, label = gene)) + ma_layers
      gg_ma      = ggplot(scatter_df, aes(A, M, label = gene)) +
        geom_ribbon(data = fv$bg, aes(x = A_mid, ymin = M_lo, ymax = M_hi),
                    fill = "gray80", alpha = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
        ma_layers

      print(ma_base_gg)
      save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, gene_set$stem,
                          sprintf("ma_RA_vs_Arco1_%s.pdf", fv_name)),
                ma_base_gg, base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)
      print(gg_ma)
      save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, gene_set$stem,
                          sprintf("ma_RA_vs_Arco1_%s_bg.pdf", fv_name)),
                gg_ma, base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)

      # OE log2FC vs Glut-RA/Glut-Arco-1 FC
      marker_sets_cur = list(
        markers     = markers     %>% filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut"),
        markers_pos = markers_pos %>% filter(tg == tg_cur, cell_class == "Glut")
      )
      iwalk(marker_sets_cur, function(mset, mset_name) {
        df = scatter_df %>% inner_join(mset %>% dplyr::select(gene, avg_log2FC), by = "gene")
        if (nrow(df) == 0) return()
        jit = position_jitter(width = 0.02, height = 0.02, seed = 42)
        gg = ggplot(df, aes(avg_log2FC, M, label = gene)) +
          geom_point(size = 0.8, position = jit) +
          ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 1.5, position = jit,
                                   min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf) +
          geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "gray50") +
          geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "gray50") +
          labs(x = sprintf("avg_log2FC (%s OE)", tg_cur), y = fv$y_lab,
               title = sprintf("%s – %s", tg_cur, gene_set$stem)) +
          theme_bw() + plot_theme()
        print(gg)
        save_plot(file.path(out_dir_tg, gene_set$stem,
                            sprintf("oe_vs_RA-Arco1_%s_%s.pdf", mset_name, fv_name)),
                  gg, base_height = 1.5, base_width = 1.5)
      })
    })
  }
})
```
